name: Louise
text: Well I do not have the words to explain how grateful I am to have found such a caring, loving and knowledgeable dog minder. I have struggled to find an environment that was suitable with having a small and large dog, quite the odd combination, however, Linda put my mind at total ease with regular updates and lovely pictures/videos. As we all know, having fur babies and entrusting them to a new minder is always quite nerve wrecking for us humans. I can hand in heart say dogs speak for themselves, so much so on one collection day Co Co ran back to go with Linda😂 that’s all the confirmation I needed! I could not find the right words to recommend Linda for the service she provides as I don’t believe it exists any where else. Please any one looking for a day minder/holiday stay don’t go to anyone else this is a beautiful caring doggy retreat for them. So we can be at peace while they are enjoying themselves. Thank you agin Linda, see you soon ❤️❤️❤️

name: Ramez
text: What an amazing couple! True dog lovers. They are loving and cared for our dogs as their own. I highly recommend Linda and Micheal, they are both passionate and professional.

name: Jen
text: I recently used PetBacker for the first time to find a dog sitter and chose Linda and Michael to look after my dog, Bear, for 15 days. From the moment I met them, I knew Bear would be in excellent hands. They have a lovely home with plenty of outdoor space for dogs to run and play, and it’s clear they are both genuine animal lovers. Throughout Bear’s stay, Linda provided daily updates, which I really appreciated and found very reassuring. When Bear experienced a few health issues, Linda was proactive in reaching out, asking how best to help and what would be in his best interest. She quickly understood Bear’s personality and needs and cared for him accordingly. I couldn’t be happier with the care Bear received and would highly recommend Linda and Michael to anyone looking for trustworthy, caring pet sitters.

name: Bethan
text: First time using Linda and her husband for daycare and I am always worried leaving Koba as he is a very big dog who does have separation anxiety. However they were amazing and left daily reviews to see how he was doing! He went for long off lead walks twice a day and they gave him lots of love. I picked him out and he was not stressed and happy to be there which was really happy to see. They were absolutely amazing with him and will be using them again! Very accommodating for extra large breed dogs!

name: Carla
text: My puppy was very happy the 4 days he stayed with Linda and Michael. He made a best friend, Paco. They had a lot of fun and were always playing together 😍 I managed to travel totally rested, because Linda sent me news of my baby every day. She is simply an angel, she treated my baby like a puppy of hers. I will repeat it more times, absolutely for sure. Thank you for everything you did ❤️
